custom_fields.description: An object where each key is the GID of a custom field and its corresponding value is either an enum GID, string, number, or object (depending on the custom field type). See the [custom fields guide](/docs/custom-fields-guide) for details on creating and updating custom field values.

additionalProperties.description: "{custom_field_gid}" => Value (can be text, a number, etc.). For date, use format "YYYY-MM-DD" (e.g., 2019-09-15). For date-time, use ISO 8601 date string in UTC (e.g., 2019-09-15T02:06:58.147Z).

followers.description: *Create-only*. Comma separated string of users. Followers are a subset of members who have opted in to receive "tasks added" notifications for a project.

owner.description: The current owner of the project, may be null.

team.description: The team that this project is shared with.
